name: collector emits no_data and exits zero when the rubric loop source file is absent (no crash on cross-loop unavailability)
command: mkdir -p space && printf 'dimensions: {performance: {enabled: true}}\nshare: never\n' > space/config.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/collector.sh" --metric rubric-pass-rate --config space/config.yaml 2>out.txt && grep -q 'rubric_pass_rate=no_data' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
